data.body: AC amendment (Gap Analysis): T3 references plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md in SKILL.md text. This contract file is created by sibling story bec5-7f84 (Story A). If Story A has not been completed when T3 is committed, check-referential-integrity.sh will fail. Pre-condition: confirm bec5-7f84 is complete before committing T3, OR add a placeholder external-dependencies-block.md that satisfies the referential integrity check. Acceptance criteria addendum: 'If external-dependencies-block.md does not exist, create a minimal placeholder with a ## Purpose heading before committing T3' (Verify: test -f plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md).
